deals.title: @vienna.unlimited Angebot
deals.description: Vienna’s tap water comes straight from protected mountain springs in the Alps and is considered among the highest-quality drinking water in the world. With around 1,800 public drinking fountains spread across the city, you’re almost never far from a free refill on a hot summer day. So before you buy another bottle of water, bring a reusable bottle and save your money. #vienna #wien #viennatravel #traveltips #viennatips Quelle: TikTok @vienna.unlimited.

Juni! 🛒 Jetzt bestellen auf www.blej.at 📍 Blej Gusto Italiano Buchengasse 74, 1100 Wien ⚠️ Nur für kurze Zeit – nicht verpassen! #blej #blejgu

deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @vienna.info
deals.description: the countdown is on for the Summer Night Concert 😍 📅 Friday, 19 June 2026, 8:45pm 📍Schönbrunn Palace Park, Vienna 🎶 Vienna Philharmonic 🎫 Free entry, no tickets required Will I see you there? 💕 Quelle: TikTok @vienna.info.

deals.title: @tobi.eulerrolle Angebot
deals.description: A swimming spot in Vienna that feels unreal👇🏻 Kaiserwasser is one of those places where the city suddenly becomes quiet. You are still in Vienna, close to the skyline and the U1, but surrounded by water, trees and soft summer light. It’s a free natural swimming spot on a side arm of the Old Danube — perfect for a slow afternoon, a picnic by the water or a sunset swim. 📍Kaiserwasser, Vienna Save this for your next summer day in Vienna. . . . . #vienna #wien #summerinvienna #thingstodoinvienna

deals.description: Weils nicht immer mega spektakulär sein muss und trz schön sein kann (& kostenlos <3!) Diesen mega schönen Durchgang findet ihr hier: 📍 Lerchenfeld Straße 13 #wientipps #wien #wienliebe Quelle: TikTok @vivienhannah4.
